texto: The answer to old age is to keep one's mind busy and to go on with one's life as if it were interminable. I always admired Chekhov for building a new house when he was dying of tuberculosis.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Leon Edel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “The answer to old age is to keep one's mind busy and to go on with one's life as if it were inter…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, vida, busy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de busy e mind.
